ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "club" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the player is associated with */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Reference to the position the player plays on the field */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" INTEGER /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "foot_preference" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract with the club expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club FOREIGN KEY ("club") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_nationality FOREIGN KEY ("nationality") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the soccer club */,
  "league" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the club participates in */,
  "country" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the club is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the club's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the club's home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Current manager of the club */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the soccer position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the soccer league */,
  "country" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the league is based */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Current champion of the league */,
  "top_scorer" TEXT /* Current top scorer of the league */,
  "top_assister" TEXT /* Current top assist maker of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
